expectations.text: Explains that GitHub Actions builds the Docker image
expectations.evidence: Stage 2 details the full build process including docker/build-push-action, version tagging, artifact saving.

expectations.text: References ghcr.io as the image registry
Explains the deploy-test branch image tag update mechanism
expectations.evidence: Job 3 'deploy' explains checkout deploy-test, sed replacement, commit with retry logic.

expectations.text: Explains the pull-based sync via systemd timer
expectations.evidence: Stage 3 details scgc-sync-data.timer, 5-minute interval, scgc-sync-data.sh pulling both worktrees.

expectations.text: Explains the systemd path unit that triggers deployment
expectations.evidence: Stage 4 details scgc-deploy.path watching docker-stack.yml, triggering scgc-deploy.service.

expectations.text: Presents steps in correct order: push -> build -> push image -> update deploy branch -> sync -> detect -> deploy
expectations.evidence: 5 stages in correct order. Also includes timing estimates and key design decisions.
